name: Customer Family Transactions
query:
SELECT
	'Sales Order' as "Type::110",
	so.name as "Sales Order:Link/Sales Order:140",
	NULL as "Sales Invoice:Link/Sales Invoice:140",
	so.customer as "Customer:Link/Customer:160",
	so.transaction_date as "Date:Date:100",
	so.base_net_total as "Net Total:Currency:120",
	0 as "Outstanding:Currency:120"
FROM
	`tabSales Order` so
	JOIN `tabCustomer` c ON c.name = so.customer
WHERE
	so.docstatus = 1
	AND COALESCE(NULLIF(c.cm_root_customer, ''), c.name) = %(root_customer)s
	AND (%(from_date)s IS NULL OR so.transaction_date >= %(from_date)s)
	AND (%(to_date)s IS NULL OR so.transaction_date <= %(to_date)s)
	AND (%(sales_person)s IS NULL OR EXISTS (
		SELECT 1 FROM `tabSales Team` st
		WHERE st.parenttype = 'Sales Order' AND st.parent = so.name AND st.sales_person = %(sales_person)s
	))
UNION ALL
SELECT
	'Sales Invoice' as "Type::110",
	NULL as "Sales Order:Link/Sales Order:140",
	si.name as "Sales Invoice:Link/Sales Invoice:140",
	si.customer as "Customer:Link/Customer:160",
	si.posting_date as "Date:Date:100",
	si.base_net_total as "Net Total:Currency:120",
	si.outstanding_amount as "Outstanding:Currency:120"
FROM
	`tabSales Invoice` si
	JOIN `tabCustomer` c ON c.name = si.customer
WHERE
	si.docstatus = 1
	AND COALESCE(NULLIF(c.cm_root_customer, ''), c.name) = %(root_customer)s
	AND (%(from_date)s IS NULL OR si.posting_date >= %(from_date)s)
	AND (%(to_date)s IS NULL OR si.posting_date <= %(to_date)s)
	AND (%(sales_person)s IS NULL OR EXISTS (
		SELECT 1 FROM `tabSales Team` st
		WHERE st.parenttype = 'Sales Invoice' AND st.parent = si.name AND st.sales_person = %(sales_person)s
	))
ORDER BY
	5 asc, 1 asc
